templates.tradeoff_prefix: There is a tradeoff between price and top-tier sound.
templates.recommend_main: Based on your needs, I recommend {name} (${price}).
templates.price_alternative: For a lower-cost alternative, {name} (${price}) keeps strong value.
templates.price_fallback: I will keep this value-focused and avoid higher-priced options.
templates.cta_soft: If you want, I can narrow this down to one final pick.
templates.cta_close: If this sounds right, I can help you finalize one option now.

snippets.trust_authentic: All products are authentic with {warranty_months}-month warranty.
snippets.trust_return: You also get a {return_policy_days}-day return window.
